metadata.seed: Why do I get so down (depressed?) at the beginning of every semester? It may not be real depression but I do get down and gloomy during the beginning of every semester. I’m in college and have a full time job, so I’m keeping pretty busy. But when I do have a little time to myself, I just want to sit and stare at a wall. It’s not just me; my family has noticed that I act this way too. Why do I do this and is there anything I can do to help? I’m taking 100mg of sertraline already!

patient.query: Why do I get so down (depressed?) at the beginning of every semester? It may not be real depression but I do get down and gloomy during the beginning of every semester. I’m in college and have a full time job, so I’m keeping pretty busy. But when I do have a little time to myself, I just want to sit and stare at a wall. It’s not just me; my family has noticed that I act this way too. Why do I do this and is there anything I can do to help? I’m taking 100mg of sertraline already!

automatic_thoughts: I just want to sit and stare at a wall
behaviors: sitting and staring at a wall

llm_response.response: It sounds like this pattern at the beginning of each semester is really impacting you, and it's understandable you're wanting to understand why. Can you tell me a little more about what goes through your mind when you notice yourself feeling down and wanting to stare at a wall?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds like the beginning of each semester brings up a really difficult and draining experience for you, and it's understandable that you're wanting to understand why. It takes courage to acknowledge these feelings, especially when you're already managing a lot with college and a job.

socratic_questioning.response: It sounds like this pattern at the beginning of each semester is really impacting you, and it's understandable you're wanting to understand why. Can you tell me a little more about what goes through your mind when you notice yourself feeling down and wanting to stare at a wall?

alternative_perspective.response: It sounds like this pattern at the beginning of each semester is really impacting you, and it's understandable that you're wanting to understand why. Imagine a close friend was experiencing this – what do you think they might notice about your situation that could be contributing to these feelings?

safety_check.response: It sounds like you're experiencing a really tough time at the start of each semester, and it's understandable that you're wanting to understand why. When you say you feel "down and gloomy," were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
